CREATE TABLE `__new_user_profiles` (
	`uid` text PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	`phones_json` text DEFAULT '[]' NOT NULL,
	`emails_json` text DEFAULT '[]' NOT NULL,
	`social_links_json` text DEFAULT '[]' NOT NULL,
	`websites_json` text DEFAULT '[]' NOT NULL,
	`location_json` text,
	`avatar_image_key` text,
	`cover_image_key` text,
	`cover_image_keys_json` text DEFAULT '[]' NOT NULL,
	`store_details_json` text DEFAULT '{}' NOT NULL,
	`specialties_json` text DEFAULT '{"main":[],"sub":{}}' NOT NULL
)
